title: Recent entries
subtitle: tools and libraries published in the last 30 days, across personal and org accounts

list.name: dem-drawer
list.description: Browser-based DEM editor with live 3D preview and GeoTIFF export — paint a heightmap, see the terrain in real time, ship it as a georeferenced raster.

list.name: hugo-cdn
list.description: Hugo template that turns a content tree into a static CDN catalog: every collection and asset gets a JSON descriptor plus a `.well-known/cdn.json` entry-point. Deployable to Pages or Netlify, no extra service.

list.name: ohm-zotero-chrome
list.description: Chrome extension that attaches the current page or any link as a linked-URL attachment to an existing Zotero item. Companion to the OHM Zotero plugin.

list.name: ohm-zotero
list.description: Zotero plugin that manages OHM data descriptors (`ohm:*` tags) so the historical-data index can be curated from a researcher's own bibliography.

list.name: geocontext-qgis
list.description: QGIS plugin that exports the current map view as `gcx.json` plus `datasets/*.geojson`, saved locally or pushed to a GitHub repo via the system git.

list.name: ofm-items
list.description: Foundry VTT module: click an object — token or live ghost — and a Gaia-backed dialog answers _given this object and where we are, what can I do with it?_ as a clickable list of affordances.

list.name: ofm-unreal
list.description: Unreal Engine plugin: point it at a fantasy map name and a zoom level, every visible Mapbox-style layer becomes an actor hierarchy and every feature becomes a primitive or your own Blueprint class. No Mapbox SDK dependency.

list.name: geomqtt
list.description: Redis wrapper with MQTT output for real-time geospatial state — the pipe behind live ghosts and shared worlds in Open Fantasy Maps.

list.name: vineland-runner
list.description: Python CLI for evaluating LLM agents against a psychometric instrument adapted from the Vineland Adaptive Behavior Scales (VABS-3). Targeting NeurIPS 2026 Education Track pilot — 8 models × 24 items × 5 replications.

list.name: georender
list.description: Symbolic map rendering service: applies a named JSON ruleset to geospatial data and renders PNGs as slippy tiles, full bbox images, or ad-hoc POSTed GeoJSON. Apache-2.0, shipped as a container.

list.name: openapi-gateway
list.description: FastAPI-based API gateway with automatic discovery of services via Docker labels — drop the labels on a container and it picks up the OpenAPI spec and routes through.

list.name: deploykit
list.description: CLI to deploy multi-service projects to cloud platforms from a single `deployment.json` config. `dk init`, set a token, `dk deploy`.
